title: About Me

bio.p1: I'm Rounak Naik — a final-year Computer Engineering student at PCCE, Goa. I'm a full-stack developer, freelancer, and entrepreneur passionate about building technology that creates real-world impact. From apps deployed by the government to platforms that competed nationally, I don't just code — I ship.
bio.p2: I've won 5 hackathons and 8 ideathons, been recognized with the Young Entrepreneur Award by the Chief Minister of Goa, and completed a tech internship at Turtlemint. My projects span mobile apps, AI-driven platforms, Web3 blockchain systems, and freelance client work for businesses across India, the US, Netherlands, Kenya, and the Philippines.
bio.p3: Beyond building, I give back — as ACM Chapter Chair, GDG workshop instructor, and speaker at Google Developer events. I believe technology, built with empathy, can solve the world's hardest problems.

available: Open to new opportunities, internships, and project collaborations.
